scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n server,vite -c blue,green "node server/index.js" "cd dashboard && npx vite"
scripts.dev:seeded: USE_SEED=true concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n server,vite -c blue,green "USE_SEED=true node server/index.js" "cd dashboard && VITE_USE_SEED=true npx vite"
scripts.install:all: cd dashboard && npm install && cd ../server && npm install
scripts.version:patch: npm version patch && git push && git push --tags
scripts.version:minor: npm version minor && git push && git push --tags
scripts.version:major: npm version major && git push && git push --tags
scripts.docker:publish: docker buildx build --platform linux/amd64,linux/arm64 -t ghcr.io/georgesg/vibebag:latest -t ghcr.io/georgesg/vibebag:$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") --push .
